message:
feat(fcp-sdk, fcp-streaming): add streaming support with WebSocket transport

Implement streaming data channels for real-time connector event
delivery, providing both a high-level SDK interface and a low-level
WebSocket transport layer.

fcp-sdk/src/streaming.rs (532 lines):
- StreamingClient: manages multiple named streams with automatic
  reconnection, backpressure signaling, and graceful shutdown
- StreamConfig: per-stream configuration (buffer size, reconnect
  policy, filter expressions, delivery guarantees)
- StreamEvent: typed event envelope with sequence numbers, timestamps,
  and connector provenance metadata
- EventFilter: server-side filter expressions to reduce bandwidth
  (topic patterns, field projections, deduplication windows)
- StreamMetrics: per-stream observability (messages received, bytes
  transferred, reconnect count, last-event timestamps)
- Comprehensive tests for connection lifecycle, filter application,
  backpressure handling, and metric accumulation

fcp-sdk/src/lib.rs, prelude.rs:
- Register streaming module and re-export key types in prelude

fcp-streaming/src/websocket.rs (302 lines):
- WebSocket frame handling with ping/pong keepalive and configurable
  timeouts for idle connection detection
- Binary and text message multiplexing with per-stream routing
- Connection upgrade negotiation with subprotocol selection
- Graceful close handshake with drain timeout
- Tests for frame parsing, keepalive, and close sequences

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
